title: CodeGrind AI Assistant: Enhanced Problem-Solving Help in the IDE
summary: Highlighting the new Azure OpenAI-powered assistant integration that guides users through problems with multiple model support and real-time guidance inside the editor.
core_message: CodeGrind now ships an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant that assists with problem solving inside the real-time code editor. Users can switch models, get contextual hints, and see step-by-step guidance while coding, all within the familiar three-panel workspace (Problem, Editor, AI Chat). This improves learning flow without leaving the coding context.
cta: Open CodeGrind, start a new problem, and try the AI assistant to get guided hints without leaving the editor.
visual_brief: Short demo video (15–20s): show a user typing a LeetCode-style prompt, AI assistant panel suggesting a plan, then code snippets appearing in the editor with inline explanations. End with a quick model-switch tip and a CTA card.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

bluesky_personal.text: CodeGrind AI Assistant is now in the IDE. See Azure OpenAI-powered guidance inside the three-panel workspace (Problem, Editor, AI Chat) with model switching, contextual hints, and step-by-step plans. Watch the demo: from prompt to code, all in one view. Learn more: https://codegrind.online

linkedin.text: CodeGrind introduces an Azure OpenAI-powered AI Assistant right inside the real-time code editor. Switch models, receive contextual hints, and view step-by-step guidance across the Problem, Editor, and AI Chat panels. The 15–20s demo showcases typing a LeetCode-style prompt, a plan from the AI, and inline code explanations. Open CodeGrind, start a new problem, and try the AI assistant to stay in the editor. https://codegrind.online

facebook_page.text: CodeGrind introduces an Azure OpenAI-powered AI Assistant inside the IDE. See how the three-panel workspace—Problem, Editor, AI Chat—offers contextual hints, model switching, and step-by-step guidance while you code. Watch a short demo showcasing typing a prompt, AI-generated plan, and live code updates, then try CodeGrind for yourself. Learn more at the linked page.

instagram.caption: See a live demo of CodeGrind AI Assistant in action: typing a LeetCode-style prompt, AI suggesting a plan, and code snippets appearing in the editor with inline explanations. All within the editor workspace. Try it in CodeGrind now and start a new problem with guided hints from the AI—learn more on the site.
